surface.name: Snowflake trial + Snowsight load data into a table
surface.selection_basis: Prefer hosted Snowsight over SnowSQL local client. Snowsight Load data UI creates/loads a table from local files and reports rows inserted. Trial credits cover warehouse compute for the first load.

alternatives_considered.name: Snowflake in 20 minutes with SnowSQL
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Requires installing SnowSQL locally; Snowsight is the hosted console path.

alternatives_considered.name: VS Code Snowflake extension
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Optional IDE path after account exists.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Snowflake trial account, sign in to Snowsight, and load sample/local data into a table.
assumed_prior_state: A browser can use Snowsight; a small CSV/JSON file is available.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Snowsight finishes Load and displays the number of rows successfully inserted into the table.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Load Data UI shows successful row insert count for the target table.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Load data using Snowsight documents Create table from file / Load into table ending with rows successfully inserted.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: First hosted success is loaded queryable data in Snowflake, not account creation alone.

prerequisites.requirement: Snowflake account (30-day trial provides free credits).
Role with privileges to create/load tables (trial ACCOUNTADMIN works).

primary_path.action: Sign up for a Snowflake trial and activate the account.
Sign in to Snowsight and select a role with CREATE TABLE / INSERT privileges.
primary_path.success_signal: Databases / Create Table From File available.

primary_path.action: Create → Table → From File (or Load data into a Table), choose database/schema, and select a local data file.
Confirm schema settings and click Load (warehouse may resume).
Confirm Snowsight reports rows successfully inserted.

friction_gates.description: Running warehouse consumes credits; trial credits cover introductory loads.
